nasb.text: All the rivers flow into the sea, Yet the sea is not full. To the place where the rivers flow, There they flow again.

esv.text: All streams run to the sea, but the sea is not full; to the place where the streams flow, there they flow again.

cnv.text: 江河向海裡流，海卻不滿溢； 江河之水歸回本源，循環流轉。

ccb.text: 江河涌流入海，海却不会满溢； 江河从何处流出，又返回何处。

csbs.text: 江河都向海里流， 海却不满盈； 江河从哪里流出， 又转回哪里。
